company_summary: Stripe builds financial infrastructure for the internet, enabling businesses to accept payments, manage revenue, and scale operations globally. The company has been expanding aggressively into developer-facing financial products including billing, tax, treasury, and fraud prevention. Stripe's core identity is as a developer-first platform, with product decisions driven by API design quality and deep technical credibility.
fit_indicators: Stripe is deeply API and developer-platform oriented — Sudheer built microservices and internal tooling at RNTBCI consumed across Nissan/Renault/Mitsubishi orgs, demonstrating platform-scale product thinking
Stripe products serve enterprise clients with complex auth and identity needs — Sudheer implemented OKTA-based authentication systems in a multi-brand enterprise environment directly paralleling this
Senior PM roles at Stripe require bridging legacy and modern systems — Sudheer led legacy modernisation projects at RNTBCI, a core skill Stripe values in infrastructure product work
Stripe increasingly invests in AI-driven financial tooling — Sudheer is actively building multi-agent AI systems with Claude API, directly relevant to Stripe's emerging AI product surface
Stripe values technical PMs who can partner credibly with engineers — Sudheer's 4 years as a full-stack Java engineer gives him the engineering depth Stripe explicitly looks for in PM candidates

contact_targets.title: Group Product Manager or Director of Product
contact_targets.function: Product — Payments, Billing, or Developer Platform
contact_targets.reason: Direct hiring manager equivalent for Senior PM roles; best positioned to evaluate technical product background and vouch internally

contact_targets.title: Senior Product Manager
contact_targets.function: Product — same team as target role
contact_targets.reason: Peer-level contact who can speak to team culture, current priorities, and make a warm internal referral

contact_targets.title: Engineering Manager
contact_targets.reason: Stripe PMs work in tight partnership with EMs; an EM contact validates Sudheer's engineering credibility and can champion him as a technically fluent PM candidate
